{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 0.3,

    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.3,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "To confirm scope: should “clean this up” mean (A) a light copyedit focused on grammar, clarity, and concision without altering structure or claims, or (B) a deeper rewrite that can reframe the thesis and reorganize content? Please choose A or B.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to “Clean this up” most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level editing for clarity, grammar, and concision.",
    "RX.1": "Editing should preserve honest signaling of uncertainty and avoid inadvertently overstating certainty when tightening language.",
    "RX.2": "Cleanup must not strengthen claims beyond what the described evidence supports.",
    "RX.3": "Scope discipline is required to limit work to cleanup rather than broader re-framing or methodological critique unless requested.",
    "RX.4": "Edits should avoid introducing misleading phrasing that could cause misuse or misinterpretation in scientific contexts.",
    "RX.5": "All changes should be traceable to the provided text and preserve the provenance of technical details and results."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: To confirm scope: should “clean this up” mean (A) a light copyedit focused on grammar, clarity, and concision without altering structure or claims, or (B) a deeper rewrite that can reframe the thesis and reorganize content? Please choose A or B.

rationale.R1.6: The request to “Clean this up” most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level editing for clarity, grammar, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Editing should preserve honest signaling of uncertainty and avoid inadvertently overstating certainty when tightening language.
rationale.RX.2: Cleanup must not strengthen claims beyond what the described evidence supports.
rationale.RX.3: Scope discipline is required to limit work to cleanup rather than broader re-framing or methodological critique unless requested.
rationale.RX.4: Edits should avoid introducing misleading phrasing that could cause misuse or misinterpretation in scientific contexts.
rationale.RX.5: All changes should be traceable to the provided text and preserve the provenance of technical details and results.
